subcodes.first_line: O thou who art wronged in the path of Baha! That which thou hadst written I have perused, and I grieve for thy sorrowful state [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظلومه در سبیل بهاء آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی قرائت نمودم و بر حال حزینت افسوس
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
